APPEAL OF CRIMINAL JUDGMENT
MINI MINUTES: PLF/RESP COUNSEL LAURA ZUNINO & DEF/APP COUNSEL CHARLES E. HILL III APPEARED: MATTER IS SUBMITTED: JUDT ON APPEAL AFFIRMED.

Motion To Set Aside Court'S Dismissal & To Allow Filing Of Opening Brief
MINI MINUTES: PLT/RESP COUNSEL, LOUISE OGDEN DID NOT APPEAR SUBMITS WITHOUT ARGUMENT: DEF/APP COUNSEL CHARLES HILL APPEARED: MATTER IS SUBMITTED.

Court'S Motion To Dismiss For Failure To File Opening Brief.
MINI MINUTES: COUNSEL FOR PLTF/RESP LOUISE OGDEN APPEARED: COUNSEL FOR DEFT/APP CHARLES HILL III DID
NOT APPEAR: MATTER IS SUBMITTED: COURT'S MOTION TO DISMISS IS GRANTED AND THE APPEAL IS DISMISSED.
